title: Kosmopack
description: Vanilla Compatible, Quality of Life, Possum Affirming client-side pack.
body:
## Kosmopack!

Quality of Life, client-only modpack for vanilla players. Made with friends in mind.

* Keeps the game vanilla - you can still connect to vanilla servers and play vanilla game.
* The pack is intended to be non-invasive and playable out of the box.
* No new blocks are added; the pack is just quality of life (and sometimes arbitrary weirdness).
* All mods can be enabled/disabled to suit your taste and needs.

## Included Mods

The list is bound to change - skrem if it's badly out of date!

* Performance: Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, Spark, Borderless Mining, Dynamic FPS, Smooth Boot, Entity Culling
* Visual: Iris, Indium, Axolotl Buckets, LambDynamicLights, Sodium Extra + Reese's Options
* Mapping: JourneyMap, VoxelMap, Xaero's Map
* Masa Mods: Litematica, Tweakeroo, Minihud, Itemscroller + Craftfix, Servux, Masa Gadget, Syncmatica
* Technical: Carpet, Carpet Extra, Carpet Autocrafting Table, Essential Client
* Aesthetic: 3D Skin Layers, Blur, Capes, Continuity, Distant Horizons, Not Enough Animations, Falling Leaves, Fabric Sky Boxes, Eating Animation
* Design: WorldEdit + CUI, Geodesy
* Utility: In-Game Account Switcher, Controlling, Command Macros, Cherished Worlds, Creative One-Punch, Logical Zoom, Inventory Profiles Next
* Informational: Roughly Enough Items, WTHIT, Horse Stats Vanilla, Better Mount HUD, Mod Menu, AppleSkin, Advancement Info
* Bugfixes: Model Gap Fix, Tooltip Fix, View Distance Fix, Head Name Fix, Chat Up, More Chat History, Don't Clear Chat History
* Network: ViaFabric, Twitch Chat Bridge, No Chat Reports

## Optional Mods

Some mods are disabled by default since they change the way you interact with the game in ways that might be considered disruptive if you're not used to them. These include Itemscroller (changes bulk inventory operations), Entity Culling (might cause entities to disappear when using freecam) and others. Check the mod list if you're interested in those extra mods.

## Migration

When migrating from a previous version of the modpack you can copy all your settings & saves so there's less time spent configuring things.

Copy the following files/folders from the old instance to the new instance; when asked, choose "Overwrite":

* journeymap
* voxelmap
* config
* itemscroller
* options.txt
* optionsof.txt
* saves
* schematics
* screenshots
* servers.dat
* XaeroWaypoints
* XaeroWorldMap

It's okay if some files/folders are missing in your instance.

## Source Code

This pack may contain custom builds of mods, especially whenever a new Minecraft version lands and official ports are not available yet. These mods are marked with `Kosmolot` in the version number. Source code for the ports is available on [my Github account](https://github.com/kosma).

## Credits

* Modpack icon: heroeant
